title: Eva 04
wikitext:
[]: Eva 04             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Fri Jan 12, 2007 5:23 pm I seem to remember from some time ago seeing a glimpse of yongouki sometime during the series, but I just finished re-watching the series and don't remember seeing it at all. Can someone confirm that it was/wasn't actually seen during the series?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Fri Jan 12, 2007 5:36 pm I've seen a model kit of Eva 04. It was shaped exactly like 03, but silver and red.

[]:             Quote Post by KingSpider » Fri Jan 12, 2007 5:40 pm It just explodes, nothing more.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Fri Jan 12, 2007 5:43 pm Essentially, but I still find it kinda cool that a saw a model for it.

[]:             Quote Post by KingSpider » Fri Jan 12, 2007 5:49 pm Eva 03 and 04 models are abundant

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Fri Jan 12, 2007 5:56 pm So it was never shown at all during the series? I've seen several model kits for it, tis just a recoloring of unit three with sharper looking teeth.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jan 12, 2007 5:57 pm zephyr72 wrote: So it was never shown at all during the series? I've seen several model kits for it, tis just a recoloring of unit three with sharper looking teeth.

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Fri Jan 12, 2007 6:04 pm that's too bad. thanks for confirming my suspicion.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Fri Jan 12, 2007 6:23 pm Was never shown in the series, but the design that you see for models and stuff is official, it was published by Gainax. Personally, I wonder color 04's skin and eyes are... We get to see 00's skin, eyes and skin of 01, 02, and 03, but 04 and the harpies remain a mystery.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Jan 12, 2007 7:46 pm KingSpider wrote: It just explodes, nothing more.
